name: prmission-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Prmission Protocol — consent-gated data exchange with ERC-8004 trust verification

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node dist_test/smoke.test.js
scripts.examples:smoke: npm run build && npm run build:examples && node dist_examples/00-smoke.js
scripts.examples:permission: npm run build && npm run build:examples && node dist_examples/01-read-permission.js
scripts.examples:escrow: npm run build && npm run build:examples && node dist_examples/02-read-escrow.js
scripts.examples:flow: npm run build && npm run build:examples && node dist_examples/10-consent-escrow-settle.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
